_note: The Field Guide (GAP.2). `start:true` entries are known from the off (no event injected). The rest auto-unlock when a DISTINCTIVE trigger phrase appears in the event log, teaching an OBSCURE system the first time you meet it. Triggers are deliberately narrow (bracket markers / full verb phrases) so a one-time [Codex] beat never crowds another system's log lines. Keep hints short + actionable.

entries.title: Your Field Journal
entries.hint: This journal fills as you discover the world's ways — creatures, places, and the many things you can DO. Press Y to read it often.

entries.title: Collection Log
entries.hint: Press O to track the unique items, kills, crafts and places you have collected.

entries.title: Fast Travel
entries.hint: Press U for earned teleport shortcuts, unlocked by completing regional diaries.

entries.title: World Map
entries.hint: Press M to open the full world map — it fills in as you explore, marking landmarks and waystones.

entries.title: Training & Advancement
entries.hint: Every level grants TRAINING POINTS. Stand by a trainer suited to your calling — a guild hall or weapon master, a mage tower, a temple, a wildwarden's lodge — then open the C screen's Training tab to raise skills and learn spells.

entries.title: Combat
entries.hint: Bump into a foe, or press F / Space to strike. Position matters — hit from a flank or from cover for the edge.

entries.title: Ranged Attacks
entries.hint: Press R to loose an arrow at your locked target (SHIFT+R to aim). Cycle targets with [ and ]. Keep ammo in your quiver.

entries.title: Spells & Mana
entries.hint: Press X for your spellbook, or bind favourites to 1–5 for quick casting. Mana refills over time and with rest.

entries.title: Dungeons & Caves
entries.hint: Step onto a cave mouth or a stair and press TAB to descend. The deeper you go, the greater the danger — and the loot.

entries.title: Rest & Camp
entries.hint: Press Enter at an inn to sleep, or camp in the wild. Carry provisions and camping is a true night's rest, not a fitful doze.

entries.title: Stealth & Sneak Attacks
entries.hint: Press . to crawl and move unseen. A strike on a foe that has not noticed you lands far harder — the rogue's art, sharpened by DEX and the Stealth skill.

entries.title: Crafting
entries.hint: Press K by a forge or workbench to craft armour, weapons and goods from gathered materials.

entries.title: Gathering
entries.hint: Stand on a node to mine ore, chop wood, fish or forage herbs. Every swing trains a skill.

entries.title: Enchanting
entries.hint: At a forge, the K panel can imbue worn gear with magical power using arcane reagents — if your skill is high enough.

entries.title: Farming
entries.hint: Claim farmland and press Z to harvest crops as the seasons turn.

entries.title: Transmutation
entries.hint: Wizards can transmute any carried item straight into gold ([T] in the inventory panel).

entries.title: Building & Terraform
entries.hint: Press B on open ground to plan and raise walls, roads and fields — then save the design as a blueprint (V) to re-use in any game (L).

entries.title: Trading & Haggling
entries.hint: Press B beside a merchant to buy and sell; H opens the haggle minigame for a better price. J dumps junk in one go.

entries.title: Quests & Boards
entries.hint: Press Q for your quest log. Read a tavern's Adventurers' Board (E) for fresh tasks and bounties.

entries.title: Companions
entries.hint: Recruit allies to fight beside you. Press P for the party panel; /order sets them to follow, hold or flee.

entries.title: Hirelings
entries.hint: Not every blade needs befriending — /hire pays an adventurer to fight for you, by the day or on salary.

entries.title: Guilds
entries.hint: Complete quests to climb guild ranks for perks, and pay for skill lessons at a guild hall.

entries.title: Mounts & Stables
entries.hint: Buy a horse, mule or donkey at a stable (E) to carry more and travel roads at speed. Feed it to keep its loyalty.

entries.title: Waystones
entries.hint: Stand on a glowing waystone platform with a Wayfarer's Ring and press E to leap between the world's waystones.

entries.title: A Home of Your Own
entries.hint: Claim an abandoned building (E) and repair it into a home with a bed, a hearth and a storage chest.

entries.title: Crime & the Law
entries.hint: Theft and assault are witnessed and earn a bounty. A guard beside you offers a way to settle up — pay, jail, bribe or run.

entries.title: Bonds & Trust
entries.hint: Share a drink with /bond to mint trust you can spend on secrets, skill lessons or recruiting a friend.

entries.title: Social Checks
entries.hint: Sway an NPC with /persuade, /intimidate or /deceive — success turns on your skill and their mood.

entries.title: Romance
entries.hint: /court a willing NPC to climb from courting to sweetheart to a wedding — but a second flame stirs jealousy.

entries.title: Skilling Pets
entries.hint: Keep training a skill for a rare chance at a loyal pet that trails you. SHIFT+Z treats it to keep it happy.

entries.title: Familiars
entries.hint: A caster can bind a familiar — a cat, owl, raven or imp that trails you and lends a passive gift (more mana, faster regen, keener sight). Press E at a place of magical study (a mage tower or temple) to bind one.

entries.title: Regional Diaries
entries.hint: Press J for regional achievement tiers that pay rewards and unlock shop discounts and teleports.
